title: Cobblemon - Exp. All
description: Cobblemon EXP All adds a wearable, toggleable EXP All item to Cobblemon, letting your party gain experience from battles more easily. It is a lightweight, optional way to make team leveling smoother in both singleplayer and multiplayer.
body:
Cobblemon EXP All adds a wearable, toggleable EXP All item to Cobblemon, letting your party gain experience from battles more easily. It is a lightweight, optional way to make team leveling smoother in both singleplayer and multiplayer.

Supports Curios and Accessories slot compatibility when those mods are installed.

Note: EV sharing is not implemented yet.
